extortion.description: Founded in 1933, Modern Automotive is a family owned and operated network of dealerships located throughout South Carolina. The Network has grown to include Modern Nissan, Modern Toyota, Modern Infiniti in Winston-Salem, Modern Infiniti in Greensboro, Modern Nissan of Concord, Modern Nissan of Lake Norman, Modern Hyundai of Concord, Modern Toyota of Boone and most recently Modern Subaru of Boone.
